pack_name: Energy and Power Sector Compliance Overlay
description: Sector-specific screening controls for Nigerian electricity generation, transmission, distribution, supply, embedded generation, eligible customer, safety, technical code, metering, customer protection, and regulatory compliance documents.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay for Energy and Power Sector Compliance Overlay; intended to be applied with nigeria_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Nigerian statutes, regulations, regulator guidance, codes, directives, and sector rules available at rule-pack publication time.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Electric Power Sector Reform / Electricity Act framework and NERC regulatory framework
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Republic of Nigeria / Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission

rules.title: NERC licence, permit, or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NERC licence, permit, eligible customer approval, embedded generation permit, or electricity authorization evidence.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.

rules.title: Grid, distribution, metering, or technical-code compliance is referenced
rules.summary: Checks for Distribution Code, Grid Code, metering, connection agreement, remote reading, or technical-code compliance.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.
